---
name: UI / Design Enhancement
about: Propose a new UI component, restyling, or visual improvement
title: "[ui] "
labels: ui, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Deadline**: undefined or date
-------------------------

# Describe the UI change
A clear and concise description of the new component, restyling, or UI improvement. What is the goal of this change?

# Current UI (If applicable)
If this is an update to an existing view, provide a screenshot or description of the current state to establish context.

# Design Specifications & Mockups
Add screenshots, mockups, or wireframes to explain the proposed design. 
* **Design File Link:** [Insert link to Figma]
* **Interaction States:** Detail any hover, focus, active, or disabled states.

# Target Devices & Breakpoints
Write here which devices or screen sizes this UI component needs to support.
* **OS considerations:** (e.g., Android-only, iOS notch padding)

# To do
- [ ] Scaffold the new component/view
- [ ] Apply styles according to the design spec
- [ ] Add here...

# Acceptance criteria
Criteria to close the issue (e.g., "Component matches Figma design", "Keyboard navigation works as expected").
